prompt: Check all links in this README and report any that are broken.
Run the link checker and fix what you can — auto-repair all unambiguous broken documentation links.
Audit broken docs paths across the repository and generate a report of unfixable links.
Refactor the Python import paths in src/ to use absolute imports instead of relative ones.
Write unit tests for the authentication module.
Deploy the application to production using the CI/CD pipeline.
